name: python3-wsproto
title: python3-wsproto
description:
WebSockets state-machine based protocol implementation (Python3)
Pure-Python implementation of a WebSocket protocol stack. It's
written from the ground up to be embeddable in whatever program you
choose to use, ensuring that you can communicate via WebSockets, as
defined in RFC6455, regardless of your programming paradigm.
.
This is the Python3 package.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-wsproto because WebSockets state-machine based protocol implementation (Python3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-wsproto as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-wsproto with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-wsproto --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
